stemHtml: What is the formation process of a warm-core high-pressure system typically found in the subtropics?

options.a: Air from low latitudes flows aloft to higher latitude into stable area above continent.
options.b: Air from low latitudes flows aloft to higher latitude into stable area above ocean.
options.c: Air from high latitudes flows aloft to lower latitude into stable area above ocean.
options.d: Air from polar latitues flows aloft to lower latitude into stable area above continent.
